About Faculty of Health Sciences

Faculty of Health Sciences

; There are 13 departments under the roof of our faculty, which was established in 2010 with the aim of educating health professionals who are self-confident, respectful to ethical values, have the ability to apply their professional knowledge competently, communicate effectively, have social activity, are equipped with traditional and contemporary knowledge, and can represent us in our country and in international venues. In our country, there are 16 health professions that require undergraduate education. Üsküdar University Faculty of Health Sciences is

the most comprehensive faculty of health sciences in Turkey

with 13 of these 16 departments under its roof.

Faculty of Health Sciences Departments

Departments include

Nutrition and Dietetics, Child Development, Speech and Language Therapy, Midwifery, Occupational Therapy, Physiotherapy and Rehabilitation, Nursing, Occupational Health and Safety, Audiology, Orthotic Prosthetics, Perfusion, Health Management, Social Work

. A wide range of options can be offered in terms of

double major and minor

. As a result of the opportunity for departments to take courses from other departments, there is a very rich list of elective courses and curriculum.

Applications at the Faculty of Health Sciences

In addition to these, our faculty, which attaches importance to practice as well as education, especially in training

Health Professionals

, has made

its laboratories equipped with advanced technology

ready for student use since its establishment and continues to add new ones to these laboratories every year in line with the needs.

Our faculty, which continues to contribute to education life with its many departments,

and

modern laboratories

, will continue to grow in the coming years by following the trends towards contemporary and advanced education systems in the world.
